extra_section_contents: Software Engineer with a Master's degree in Computer Science and professional experience developing software applications, automation frameworks, and AI-driven systems. Experienced with Python, Java, JavaScript/TypeScript, C#, REST APIs, databases, automated testing, and Agile development practices. Built full-stack web applications, machine learning systems, and developer tools while collaborating across cross-functional engineering teams.
